text: btc consolidation between 92k-100k for the past month is breaking down — etf flows turning negative for first time since february
150k by june is a fade. mt gox creditor distribution overhangs march, fomc still hawkish, retail demand at 6mo low
lol no way btc hits 150k by june. would need 50%+ rally in 60 days w/ fed not cutting and earnings season negative
polymarket btc-150k-june @ 1.3% is correctly priced imo. market is efficient on this one
buying btc-150k-eoy at 9.5%. small position. catalyst is q3 etf inflow re-acceleration
fed will cut 25bp at next meeting. risk-on environment supports btc rally back toward ATH
fed minutes show divided committee. 25bp cut not the layup ppl think it is. june odds dropped from 78 → 65
looking at fed-cut june: priced at 71% on poly. 65% on kalshi. 68% on cme. fading the polymarket premium for now
ethbtc ratio at 0.034. been bearish ETH the whole year. continuing to hold the under @ 34c on poly through july
sol over 400 q3 is a free lottery ticket at 18c. liquidity drying up on the no side, polymarket leaning yes here
newsom 2028 nominee at 21c on polymarket. think this is too high — at least 3-4 other candidates with similar profiles
buttigieg 2028 dem nominee under-priced at 14c. ground game in iowa has been strongest, small donor network largest in field
super bowl LX champ markets are super illiquid. KC at 22c, Buffalo at 18c, then the rest are 8c or lower. expect liquidity in q3
spot etf cumulative net inflows breach $42b mark. sentiment turning slowly positive again
binance lists btc-quanto perp w/ 1d settle. structurally bullish for the spot side, more hedge demand from market makers
